org.docgene.model

Class XMLWord

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.XMLWord
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.docgene.model.AnchorElement, ParagraphElement, StyledElement

    public class XMLWord
extends java.lang.Object
implements ParagraphElement, org.docgene.model.AnchorElement
    Represent a word anchor in an article.

    • Field Summary

      • Fields inherited from interface org.docgene.model.StyledElement

        TYPE_NONE

      Return the write instruction for the the word.

      Return true if this anchor has an id.

      Return true if the word as being put on an existing anchor.
